Weekly Course Schedule

Week 1: Nursing Foundations; Health and Illness; Homeostasis, Adaptation, and Stress

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 1, 4, 5

Pre-class: Student Strategies training certificate, One-Minute Nurse quizzes at 80% average, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: CoursePoint orientation, CJMM prompts, Stop/Think/Respond and critical thinking discussion questions.

Clinical Lab: CoursePoint clinical activity orientation, Practice & Learn, vSim, Lippincott Client Cases, Neil O'Leary case, Client Cases second attempt.

Week 2: Nursing Process and Clinical Judgment; Asepsis; Infection Control

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 2, 10, 22

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, care-plan orientation, Opal Warfell C. difficile case, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Hand hygiene, sterile field, sterile gloves, PPE, Jared Griffin vSim, Luisa Montessori MRSA case, infection-risk care plan.

Week 3: Comfort, Rest, and Sleep; Safety; Pain Management

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 18, 19, 20

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, pain and safety case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Occupied/unoccupied bed, back massage, restraints, TENS unit, pain and fall-risk Client Cases, acute pain care plan.

Week 4: Vital Signs; Physical Assessment; Special Examinations and Tests

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 12, 13, 14

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, assessment case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Vital signs, physical assessment, glucometer use, Vernon Russell vSim, blood glucose and orthostatic hypotension cases.

Week 5: Nutrition; Fluid and Chemical Balance; Hygiene

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 15, 16, 17 plus chapter 9 review in lab

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, dehydration Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Meal trays, feeding, intake/output, bathing, perineal care, oral care, hair care, dehydration care plan.

Week 6: Body Mechanics, Positioning, and Moving; Fitness and Therapeutic Exercise; Mechanical Immobilization; Ambulatory Aids

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 23, 24, 25, 26

Pre-class: PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, mobility case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Turning, transfers, range-of-motion exercises, cast care, arm sling, crutches, canes, walkers, fall-risk care plan.

Week 7: Midterm Summative Exam; Recording and Reporting; Urinary Elimination; Bowel Elimination

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 9, 30, 31

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse SBAR quiz, documentation article, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Midterm, pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, documentation discussion, elimination Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6.

Clinical Lab: Charting, bedpan/urinal, catheterization, Foley irrigation, Kim Johnson and Marvin Hayes vSim, urinary retention care plan.

Week 8: Perioperative Care; Wound Care; Gastrointestinal Intubation

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 27, 28, 29

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse pressure injury quiz, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, perioperative/wound case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Antiembolism stockings, pneumatic compression, sterile dressing, wound irrigation, NG tube, Josephine Morrow vSim.

Week 9: Oxygenation; Airway Management; Resuscitation

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 21, 36

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse oxygen delivery quiz, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, respiratory Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Oxygen assessment, oxygen administration, suctioning, tracheostomy care, oxygen via nasal cannula case, airway care plans.

Week 10: Oral Medications; Topical and Inhalant Medications; Parenteral Medications

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 32, 33, 34

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse medication quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, medication route and dosage case, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Oral, enteral, topical, eye, ear, nasal, subcutaneous, intramuscular medication skills; polypharmacy/safety care plan.

Week 11: Culture and Ethnicity; Nurse-Client Relationship; Client Teaching; Admission, Discharge, Transfer, and Referrals

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 6, 7, 8, 11

Pre-class: PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, health education and culture Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Therapeutic communication, discharge teaching plan, end-of-life and postmortem care, health maintenance care plan.

Week 12: Law and Ethics; End-of-Life Care

Chapters: CoursePoint chapters 3, 38 and review of all prior chapters

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse delegation and end-of-life quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/Post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, end-of-life Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

Clinical Lab: Comprehensive skills stations and skills performance evaluation across previously learned skills.
